AWARDS & ACHIEVEMENTS
Celebrating our journey, our Victories...
We are humbled by the various awards and recognition we have received at every step of our journey so far. It is a testament for our hard work and dedication to be the best in every aspect of education. Each of these awards motivate us to run faster, jump higher and aim for the stars!
Best Industry Linked Emerging Institute Award
Awarded by AICTE-CII in 2014 out of 952 engineering colleges across India.
Best Placement and Career Building Award
Awarded by All India Technical and Management Council during the 3rd Annual Corporate Summit.
Sustainable Institute Industry Partnership Award
Awarded by the Society for Educational And Entrepreneurship Development (SEED), in 2014 under the Upcoming Engineering College with Good Potential category
Distinguished Alumni Outstanding Achievement Award to our Chairman Mr.R.Mohanram
Awarded by PSG College of Technology. The award was handed over by Shri YS Chowdary, Union Minister of State for Science and Technology.
Best Industry Interface Institute Award
Awarded by 24MRC Network in 2015.
Best Organization Encouraging Entrepreneurs in MSME
Awarded by ASSOCHAM in 2015.
9th Rank in DATAQUEST Survey
Ranked by TOP T Schools 2016.
National Level Award for Best Professional Institute for Skill Development
Received from Hon.Union Minister Mr. Rajeev Pradap Rudi.
Icon of Coimbatore Award
Conferred on our Principal, Dr.Sudha Mohanram by Rathinam Group of Institutions in 2015.
Woman Achiever Award 2018
Conferred on our Principal, Dr. Sudha Mohanram, by Aspire Systems.​
Igen Green Day Award Silver Category 2023 (SDG Desimination)
Awarded by IGEN
Sustainable partnership certification with UNSDG 2024
Awarded by the Institution of Green Engineers.
Academic Excellence Award 2024
Awarded by the Institution of Engineers (IEI).
